entity.label: Kemuel
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Son of Shiphtan, appointed on behalf of the tribe of Ephraim to partition the land of Canaan (Num. 34:24).

nodes.label: Kemuel
nodes.description: Son of Shiphtan, appointed on behalf of the tribe of Ephraim to partition the land of Canaan (Num. 34:24).

nodes.label: Shiphtan
nodes.description: Judicial, an Ephraimite prince at the time of the division of Canaan (Num. 34:24).

verses.text: And the prince of the tribe of the children of Ephraim, Kemuel the son of Shiphtan.
